content: QR code pairing is the dominant pattern for phone-to-desktop game sessions. Flow: desktop generates session token, encodes as QR + short alphanumeric code, phone scans or types code, server validates, phone is slotted into session. Both must be supported: QR for speed when camera available, short code (4-6 chars) for typed entry fallback. Session polling on the desktop side until phone joins. Firefox FxA pairing channel uses WebSocket + channel key extracted from QR. Key insight: QR and short code are complementary, not alternatives — QR for speed, typed code for accessibility and remote play.
